description: Keep this exact front-facing stormtrooper pixel-art sprite, transparent background, white armor, black outline, same helmet, body proportions, stance, and blaster-across-chest pose. Make only the black blaster rifle a bit smaller: about 25 percent shorter and less bulky, with a shorter barrel and smaller stock. Keep the left hand on the barrel or fore-end and the right hand at the trigger. Do not change the character size or add anything else.
